# S2E API Documentation

Welcome to the **S2E** (Subcellular Spatial Embedding) API documentation. S2E is an image-based computational framework (v0.1.2) for robust representation of subcellular RNA localization patterns using Vision Transformers.

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 3
:caption: Contents

background
installation
quickstart
architecture
api/index
```

## Package Overview

S2E transforms single-molecule transcript coordinates with membrane morphology into a unified embedding space, enabling:

- **Quantitative comparison** of subcellular RNA localization patterns
- **Pattern prediction** across seven canonical localization classes
- **Downstream analysis** via PCA, UMAP, clustering, and differential analysis
- **Drug perturbation** and **ER stress time-series** analysis

## Quick Links

- **GitHub**: S2E source repository
- **Pre-trained model**: [S2E-pattern-model on HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/hinatakaho/S2E-pattern-model)
- **Version**: 0.1.2
- **Python**: >=3.10
